decisions.what: Used ConnectButton with responsive showBalance/chainStatus/accountStatus objects on desktop and showBalance={false} on mobile drawer
decisions.why: Spec required ConnectButton with showBalance={false} on smaller screens; RainbowKit's responsive prop object cleanly satisfies this without rendering two separate ConnectButton instances on desktop

decisions.what: Locked body scroll while mobile drawer is open and exposed dialog/aria-modal semantics
decisions.why: Drawer covers viewport below header; preventing background scroll matches expected mobile drawer UX without adding new dependencies

decisions.what: Mobile drawer anchored with fixed left-0 right-0 top-16 bottom-0 rather than fixed inset-0
decisions.why: Spec says 'below header' — anchoring top to header height keeps the hamburger toggle visible and tappable while the drawer is open

decisions.what: Smooth-scroll handler resolves the anchor target via getElementById and falls back to default link behavior if the element is missing
decisions.why: Sections (#features, #how-it-works, #about) are not yet implemented; graceful fallback avoids preventing default for non-existent targets

decisions.what: Wrapped existing placeholder content in <main className='pt-16 md:pt-20'> inside the new outer <div>
decisions.why:
Spec required the App shell shape
...
so the fixed header doesn't overlap content
